headline: Conflict Without Closure
summary: U.S. stocks slide into correction as Iran conflict fuels volatility, energy jitters, and rising rates hit REITs.

headline: Why The Equinix (EQIX) Narrative Is Shifting As Analysts Revisit Valuation And AI Demand
summary: Equinix is back in focus as an updated analyst fair value estimate edges from US$1,027.15 to US$1,036.41, a modest shift that still matters if you are tracking valuation closely. This move sits alongside a wave of research where bullish voices highlight sticky, durable revenue and interconnection strengths, while more cautious analysts point to valuation and sector level questions. Read on to see how these differing views are shaping the evolving Equinix story and what to watch next in the...
